archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast adapted for Dark Mode)
vibe: Authority, Clarity, Truth. Sleek, professional trader terminal. Data is the hero.

spacing_and_layout.app_container: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8

components.cards: Flat background (bg-zinc-900/40), 1px solid border (border-zinc-800/50), NO heavy box-shadows. Hover state: border-zinc-700/50 transition-colors.
components.tables: Shadcn Table style. Remove all vertical borders. Use very subtle horizontal borders (border-zinc-800/30). Align numeric data to the right. Use font-mono for numbers.
components.forms: Inputs should have bg-zinc-900/50, border-zinc-800. Focus states MUST use higher contrast: focus:ring-1 focus:ring-zinc-500 focus:border-zinc-500.
components.charts: Recharts library. Minimalist execution. Remove bounding boxes, hide Y-axis lines if possible, keep grid lines very faint (opacity 0.1). Line chart should be a single crisp line (e.g., #FAFAFA or #34D399). Donut chart uses monochrome palette.
components.navigation: Top navigation bar with blur (backdrop-blur-md bg-zinc-950/80) and a subtle bottom border. Mobile responsive with a hamburger menu.

icons_and_media.brand_icons: react-icons/si (use SiBinance, SiEthereum, SiBitcoin, etc. for asset and broker logos)
icons_and_media.image_rules: Do NOT use placeholder image URLs. Rely entirely on lucide-react and react-icons/si for all visual assets.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. CRITICAL: Implement a strict Dark Theme using Tailwind classes. The document body MUST be bg-zinc-950 text-zinc-50.
2. CRITICAL: All numerical monetary values, percentages, and asset tickers MUST use the JetBrains Mono font (font-mono).
3. Display positive P&L metrics with text-emerald-400 and negative with text-rose-400. Do not use generic green/red.
4. For the Assets Table, ensure every row has a brand icon (use react-icons/si) next to the Ticker.
5. Use Recharts for the 'Evolução de Patrimônio' (Line Chart) and 'Alocação' (Donut Chart).
6. Ensure the layout is fully responsive. Use 1 column on mobile (grid-cols-1), expanding to 3 or 4 on desktop.
7. Include a sleek USD/EUR toggle in the dashboard header using a Shadcn Tabs or custom segmented control.
8. Form elements for the 'Add Asset' modal/page must use the dark theme inputs with clear focus states.
9. Provide robust data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='total-balance', data-testid='add-asset-btn') on all interactive elements.
